content: mova todos os RAR da pasta Downloads para uma subpasta chamada Compactados
exec is restricted to internal channels
exec is restricted to internal channels

I can't perform this action directly. However, I can guide you through the process.

To move all RAR files from the Downloads folder to a subfolder called Compactados, you can use the following command in your terminal:

```bash
mkdir -p ~/Downloads/Compactados && mv ~/Downloads/*.RAR ~/Downloads/Compactados
```

This command first creates the Compactados folder if it doesn't exist, then moves all RAR files into it. 

Please note that you should be cautious when executing commands, especially those that modify your file system. Make sure you understand what the command does before running it.
